name: alhazen-deep-research
description: Deep-research Alhazen skills sharing one TypeDB database (alh_deep_research): literature search, trend analysis, technology recon, and disease-mechanism notebook.

plugins.name: scientific-literature
plugins.description: Multi-source scientific literature search and ingestion (EPMC, PubMed, OpenAlex, bioRxiv). The schema base for the deep-research database.

plugins.name: literature-trends
plugins.description: Abductive argumentation-based literature trend analysis across tagged literature threads

plugins.name: tech-recon
plugins.description: Goal-driven technology investigation -- interview, discover, ingest, analyze, and visualize competing systems against success criteria

plugins.name: dismech-notebook
plugins.description: DisMech rare-disease mechanism knowledge mapped into the Alhazen notebook (GLAV import from the dismech source database)
